name: touch-keys
description: On-screen touch key bar for mobile: customizable keys (Esc, Tab, arrows, sticky Ctrl, voice input, image upload) docked below the terminal or as a movable floating toggle, with a drag-and-drop layout editor in its settings (bundled — see extensions/build.mjs).

touchKeys.show.description: When the on-screen key bar shows for a focused terminal.

touchKeys.style.description: Docked bar below the terminal, or a movable AssistiveTouch-style toggle over it.

touchKeys.keys.description: The key layout, as JSON (edited with the layout editor below — empty means the default layout).
